records.ety: [F. poëte, L. poëta, fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to make. Cf. Poem.]

defs: One skilled in making poetry; one who has a particular genius for metrical composition; the author of a poem; an imaginative thinker or writer.
quotes: The poet's eye, in a fine frenzy rolling, Doth glance from heaven to earth, from earth to heaven.
A poet is a maker, as the word signifies.
